infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VRoom needs access to your camera to scan the room and for AR experiences.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: VRoom needs access to your camera to scan the room.

ios.cameraUsagePermission: VRoom uses your camera for AR mesh projection.
